name: Pod2Swim
subtitle: Podcasts on your swim headset
tagline: Turn pool laps into podcast time. Load episodes onto your OpenSwim and listen underwater — no Bluetooth, no phone at the poolside.
intro: Pod2Swim turns your swim into podcast time.
pitch: Bluetooth doesn't work underwater, so Pod2Swim loads your favourite podcasts straight onto a Shokz OpenSwim — or any headset that mounts as USB storage — ready to play, lap after lap. No phone at the poolside, no streaming, no signal required.

sections.title: HOW IT WORKS
bullets: Subscribe to any podcast with the built-in search.
Browse the newest episodes from all your shows in one chronological feed.
Queue what you want for your next swim — Pod2Swim downloads it in the background.
Plug in your headset and export the whole queue in a single tap, in playback order.
Scan the headset any time to see exactly what's loaded.

sections.title: BUILT FOR SWIMMERS
bullets: Your audio lives on the headset, so you can leave the phone in the locker.
Adjustable playback speed from 0.75× to 2.5× per podcast, with the pitch preserved — fit more in before the pool closes.
Choose Replace All or Add to End on transfer, so you stay in control of what's on the device.
Episodes land in playback order, so your queue plays exactly as you arranged it.

sections.title: SIMPLE STORAGE
bullets: The queue is the single source of truth — add to download, remove to free space.
See total downloaded storage and clear it in one tap.
Optional auto-delete after export keeps things tidy.

compat: Pod2Swim works with the OpenSwim, OpenSwim Pro, and other MP3-player headsets that appear as a USB drive in the Files app. You'll need a USB-C or Lightning adapter to connect the headset to your iPhone.
disclaimer: Pod2Swim is not affiliated with Shokz. Shokz and OpenSwim are trademarks of their respective owner.
metaDesc: Pod2Swim loads your favourite podcasts onto a Shokz OpenSwim or any USB-storage swim headset, so you can listen underwater — no Bluetooth, no phone at the poolside.
